title: Foundations
description: Train line, form, light, materials, and observation through beginner-friendly studio practice.

title: Portrait & Figure
description: Develop gesture, likeness, anatomy thinking, and expressive human drawing through portraits and figure study.

title: Illustration & Storytelling
description: Learn to turn observation, mood, and imagination into story-driven images, characters, and visual sequences.

title: Design & Space
description: Explore interiors, architecture, costume, and visual planning through concept-based design pathways.

title: Digital & Motion
description: Move from drawing into digital illustration, animation, and motion-based visual storytelling.

title: Art History Path
description: Study artists, movements, and visual ideas through a dedicated lesson system designed for independent learning.
